message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.var_ddof and std_ddof for configurable degrees of freedom

Add var_ddof(ddof) and std_ddof(ddof) methods to Series. ddof=0 gives
population variance/std, ddof=1 (pandas default) gives sample. Returns
NaN when count <= ddof. Existing var()/std() continue to use ddof=1.

3 new tests, 846 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
